name: sample_sobol_synthaorta_nonplanar_v2_100
_doc: 256 Sobol samples over a 9-D cube — the 7 marginals of sample_sobol_synthaorta_v2.json PLUS the two SynthAorta non-planar Fourier multipliers δ_3 and δ_4 (Bošnjak et al. 2025, Table I; Eq 13). With δ_3, δ_4 ~ Normal(1, 0.09), the generated centrelines acquire SynthAorta-level y-axis wobble (~few mm), breaking the strict in-plane behaviour of the planar cohort. taper_mode held fixed at smoothstep. N=256 is the Sobol-native power of 2 just below the 9-D PCE rule-of-thumb (30·dim=270); bump to 512 for stable Sobol indices.
